scene: المنتج الحقيقي معروض على صينية مجلس سعودي أصيلة، أجواء دافئة، بدون أشخاص — جريش · A Najdi family table setting, represented by a warm-toned sadu weave or tribal carpet surface, evoking a traditional Saudi majlis atmosphere. · The hero product is a single-serve kraft paper cup of جريش porridge, topped with a glossy roasted-red-pepper and chili-tomato relish. The cup is placed prominently on a traditional Saudi serving tray. · props: The cream-and-gold star lid is placed casually beside the cup, partially in the frame, adding context without competing for attention. A small glossy roasted-red chili pepper rests on the porridge surface as a garnish. No additional props are included to maintain focus on the product. · composition: The composition centers the paper cup in the frame, with the star lid slightly to the side to create visual balance. The camera angle is slightly above eye level, providing a clear view of the porridge texture and garnish. The surrounding sadu weave or carpet pattern creates a rich backdrop, but stays out of focus to keep the attention on the product. · light: Warm, directional golden/tungsten lighting bathes the scene, creating soft-edged shadows. The light highlights the glossy rivulets of melted samn/oil on the porridge surface, adding a sense of warmth and freshness. Steam is visible rising from the porridge, adding to the sense of just-served authenticity. · mood: The mood is intimate and inviting, celebrating the warmth and tradition of a Saudi family gathering. The rich textures and warm lighting evoke a sense of comfort and home, encouraging viewers to imagine the taste and aroma of the dish.
prompt:
[BRAND LOCK · identity invariant, placement and composition open]
The reference image teaches the جريش brand identity. Identity is invariant — tray viewpoint, element arrangement, and tungsten character are creative decisions.
Identity DNA: A thick, creamy off-white cracked-wheat porridge, slow-cooked to a smooth oatmeal-like consistency and glistening with a pour of dark amber ghee (سمن). It is crowned with a vivid scarlet roasted-pepper-and-tomato salsa and whole red chilies, served either in a single white kraft cup or a round family-size aluminum-foil tray nested in the brand's signature red box.
INTEGRATION: The product belongs to the still-life. Metallic elements reflect warm gold onto the product's edges; tungsten tints every surface — vessels, product, dates, textile — the same warmth; textile warm-gold thread rhymes with Crimson oxblood red (~#9E1B1B) as the dominant brand color, with warm gold (~#C9971F) as the partner accent and cream (~#F3EAD7) as the neutral ground. Red leads (it is the gift-box and the badge); gold signs the wordmark/lid; cream carries the food and copy..

[REALISM & CAPTURE CHARACTER]
Capture character: film_grain_warmth heritage cinema, photoreal, warm-toned film science, organic grain in shadow. Real metal patina (CS-18), genuine wood/textile, natural dates, honest ceramic. Material truth: true cooked-grain substrate — cracked wheat or rice, honest moist matte surface with a soft mounded form, real steam where hot; served in ceramic or a foil tray with its own true finish; NEVER a fried crust, never plastic-uniform; product-truth texture: Thick, creamy, smooth porridge — soft and spoonable like rich oatmeal, glossy with ghee on top; NEVER crispy, fried, or crusted. No Hollywood-Middle-East gloss.

[SCALE CALIBRATION]
≈9–11cm tall single-serve paper cup, ≈10–11cm rim diameter. Scale anchor: the cream-and-gold star lid that sits on it is the same ~10–11cm diameter — so frame the cup as ~1× the lid's width and ~1× a closed adult fist in height. Against the crimson gift box (≈30cm long) the cup is roughly 1/3 the box length.. Render the size hierarchy honestly among the product and the cultural elements (per real Saudi-context materials — brass dallah, sadu textile, palm, true regional surfaces object sizes).

[FRAMING & PROXIMITY]
Intimate tray proximity — the still-life fills the frame, edges falling soft. No dead space.

[COLOR & CONTRAST · brand-derived + authentic heritage]
Warm tungsten field plus authentic culturally-grounded tones from real Saudi-context materials — brass dallah, sadu textile, palm, true regional surfaces (metal gold, textile deep-reds — real heritage colours, not borrowed accents). Anchored to Crimson oxblood red (~#9E1B1B) as the dominant brand color, with warm gold (~#C9971F) as the partner accent and cream (~#F3EAD7) as the neutral ground. Red leads (it is the gift-box and the badge); gold signs the wordmark/lid; cream carries the food and copy. as the modern note.

[LIGHT & LENS · warm tungsten chiaroscuro, mood not spec]
Warm intimate tungsten — a cultural interior after sunset. Directional and moody with deep shadow in negative space — WARM and soft-edged, not hard editorial, so it reads intimate. Model chooses key direction, fill from below (surface reflection), shadow depth, optional gentle flicker. POPPING COLOR INTENT: rich warmth, metallic gold gleam, textile depth, Crimson oxblood red (~#9E1B1B) as the dominant brand color, with warm gold (~#C9971F) as the partner accent and cream (~#F3EAD7) as the neutral ground. Red leads (it is the gift-box and the badge); gold signs the wordmark/lid; cream carries the food and copy. as the modern note. Lens: portrait compression; model chooses depth across the tray.

[NATURAL PLACEMENT]
The product sits naturally beside the elements as if just set down — upright on its base or gently leaning. Elements rest in their natural positions. Not a perfect grid.

[COMPANION ELEMENTS · heritage built-in, restrained]
The cultural elements ARE the companions — RESTRAINED: model chooses the count (minimal trio, quartet, or expanded with a small detail at the edge) but never crowds. Singular pieces, drawn from real Saudi-context materials — brass dallah, sadu textile, palm, true regional surfaces / World = the Najdi family table. ONE hero companion: a small glossy roasted-red chili pepper resting on/beside the porridge surface (its real garnish). Restrained background-only context (never co-hero): the cream-gold star lid, the heritage sadu/carpet ground, a wisp of steam..

[SCENE · creative seed]
Creative seed (from the system): المنتج الحقيقي معروض على صينية مجلس سعودي أصيلة، أجواء دافئة، بدون أشخاص — جريش · A Najdi family table setting, represented by a warm-toned sadu weave or tribal carpet surface, evoking a traditional Saudi majlis atmosphere. · The hero product is a single-serve kraft paper cup of جريش porridge, topped with a glossy roasted-red-pepper and chili-tomato relish. The cup is placed prominently on a traditional Saudi serving tray. · props: The cream-and-gold star lid is placed casually beside the cup, partially in the frame, adding context without competing for attention. A small glossy roasted-red chili pepper rests on the porridge surface as a garnish. No additional props are included to maintain focus on the product. · composition: The composition centers the paper cup in the frame, with the star lid slightly to the side to create visual balance. The camera angle is slightly above eye level, providing a clear view of the porridge texture and garnish. The surrounding sadu weave or carpet pattern creates a rich backdrop, but stays out of focus to keep the attention on the product. · light: Warm, directional golden/tungsten lighting bathes the scene, creating soft-edged shadows. The light highlights the glossy rivulets of melted samn/oil on the porridge surface, adding a sense of warmth and freshness. Steam is visible rising from the porridge, adding to the sense of just-served authenticity. · mood: The mood is intimate and inviting, celebrating the warmth and tradition of a Saudi family gathering. The rich textures and warm lighting evoke a sense of comfort and home, encouraging viewers to imagine the taste and aroma of the dish.
Heritage hospitality — the product welcomed onto a traditional tray. Model chooses: tray viewpoint (top-down, three-quarter elevated, near-eye-level intimate, low-angle); tray material; element arrangement and count (restrained); textile visibility (rug edge at lower frame, cushion in bokeh, near-absent).

[SUBJECT]
Authentic cultural elements per CS-13 / real Saudi-context materials — brass dallah, sadu textile, palm, true regional surfaces (e.g. brass dallah + Najdi spout per CS-18, dates per CS-21, Najdi textile). The product reads as modern but welcome.

[BRAND CONSTRAINTS]
Single product hero. Cultural elements as singular supporting context — never multiples. No alcohol, no pork (CS-21). Authentic per CS-13. No humans. no cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering, no oversaturation, no plastic CGI uniformity, no borrowed reference colours, no readable text on neighbouring objects · brand red lines: لا مشاهد ملابس رياضية/أجسام رياضية — مرفوض (محمد 2026-06-12) · this is a soft cooked dish — NO fried or crispy crust, no breading, no deep-fried texture

[OUTPUT]
8K photoreal heritage commercial photography. Warm rich grade, Crimson oxblood red (~#9E1B1B) as the dominant brand color, with warm gold (~#C9971F) as the partner accent and cream (~#F3EAD7) as the neutral ground. Red leads (it is the gift-box and the badge); gold signs the wordmark/lid; cream carries the food and copy. sharp. No overlay text, no watermark.

[SAUDI ADAPTATION — conditional]
authentic contemporary Saudi setting — true materials, never generic-Arabian sets the register. real Saudi-context materials — brass dallah, sadu textile, palm, true regional surfaces supplies the full majlis config per CS-15 (vessels CS-18, dates CS-21, Najdi textile with warm-gold thread rhyming with the brand colour). deepen Ramadan evening warmth or add Founding-Day green thread.

[CREATIVE VARIANCE DIRECTIVE]
Vary tray viewpoint, material, arrangement, element count (restrained), textile visibility, tungsten character. Hold constant: warm tungsten chiaroscuro, material texture, restraint, CS-13 authenticity. Each render a different majlis moment.
